metadata.name: simple-sow-creator
metadata.description: Statement of Work (SOW) generator for Equinox IT - creates consistent, professional SOWs using the SOW_Simple_Service_Template_Latest.docx template
metadata.author: Equinox IT

when_to_use: This skill activates when the user wants to create a Statement of Work document for a consulting engagement with Equinox IT.
purpose: Generate consistent, high-quality Statements of Work using the SOW_Simple_Service_Template_Latest.docx template. Always write in a professional, client-facing consulting tone.
tone: Professional, client-facing consulting tone. No fluff; concise, confident, but friendly. Content should be consistent even if user notes are scrappy. Use dot bullets (•) for all lists. Do not use numbered lists.

placeholders.name: SOW_NUMBER_AND_TITLE
placeholders.description: SOW number and title. Format: 'Company Name - SOW## - Work Name'

placeholders.name: SOW_CONSULTANT
placeholders.description: Name(s) of the Equinox consultant(s) engaged in the work. If multiple consultants, list one per line.

placeholders.name: SOW_CONSULTANT_ROLE
placeholders.description: Role title(s) of the Equinox consultant(s). If multiple consultants, list one per line matching SOW_CONSULTANT order.

placeholders.name: SOW_CLIENT_NAME
placeholders.description: The full legal name of the client company. Confirm with user by checking Companies Office website.

placeholders.name: SOW_SERVICE_DESCRIPTION
placeholders.description: High-level service description. Usually a block of text followed by bullets listing key services. Keep it high-level - don't duplicate what goes in Approach, Assumptions, or Exclusions.

placeholders.name: SOW_APPROACH
placeholders.description: Approach bullet points describing how the work will be conducted.

placeholders.name: SOW_ASSUMPTIONS
placeholders.description: Delivery assumptions needed for successful delivery. Brief statement followed by bullet points.

placeholders.name: SOW_EXCLUSIONS
placeholders.description: Things excluded from the engagement. Brief statement followed by bullet points. Don't duplicate with Service Description, Approach, or Assumptions.

placeholders.name: SOW_FORMAL_DELIVERABLES
placeholders.description: What will be produced and delivered by Equinox IT (scripts, documents, terraform, applications, etc.). Brief statement followed by bullet points.

placeholders.name: SOW_CLIENT_BILLING_CONTACT
placeholders.description: Name of the billing contact person

placeholders.name: SOW_BILLING_CONTACT_COMPANY_NAME
placeholders.description: Billing contact's company name

placeholders.name: SOW_BILLING_CONTACT_EMAIL
placeholders.description: Email address for the billing contact

placeholders.name: SOW_REPORTING
placeholders.description: Reporting requirements during the engagement. Default: 'Given the short nature of this assignment, no formal project reporting will be produced'
placeholders.default: Given the short nature of this assignment, no formal project reporting will be produced

placeholders.name: SOW_BILLING_BASIS
placeholders.description: Billing basis for the engagement

placeholders.name: SOW_COST_HOURS
placeholders.description: Total hours committed for the assignment. Must be numeric.

placeholders.name: SOW_CONSULTANT_RATE
placeholders.description: Hourly rate in NZ Dollars

placeholders.name: SOW_COST_AMOUNT
placeholders.description: Total cost calculated as SOW_COST_HOURS × SOW_CONSULTANT_RATE

placeholders.name: SOW_TASK_DESCRIPTION
placeholders.description: Task list as bullet points showing the plan of action. Insert newline-delimited values.

placeholders.name: SOW_TASK_HOURS
placeholders.description: Hours for each task in SOW_TASK_DESCRIPTION. Insert newline-delimited values matching task order.

placeholders.name: SOW_ESTIMATED_COST
placeholders.description: Cost per task (hours × rate). Insert newline-delimited values matching task order.

workflow.description: 5-Step Workflow: Initiation → Data Capture → Validation → Preview → Output

conditionals.action: Walk through each placeholder sequentially, prompting for each field in order

conditionals.condition: User chooses 'autocomplete' or 'paste' or 'upload' or 'rough notes'
conditionals.action: Prompt user to paste/upload all notes at once, parse and auto-fill sections, ask for clarification only on missing or conflicting data

steps.title: Step 1: Initiation & Context Check
steps.description: When user says 'create a SOW', scan conversation for any info already provided. Acknowledge what you know. Ask user: 'Would you like to complete the rest step-by-step, or autocomplete by pasting/uploading your rough notes?'

steps.title: Step 2: Data Capture - SOW Basics
steps.description: Collect SOW number/title, consultant details, and client name. Confirm legal client name with user (check Companies Office website).

steps.title: Step 2: Data Capture - Service Details
steps.description: Collect service description, approach, assumptions, exclusions, and deliverables. Ensure no duplication across these sections.

steps.title: Step 2: Data Capture - Billing & Reporting
steps.description: Collect billing contact details, reporting requirements, and billing basis.

steps.title: Step 2: Data Capture - Tasks & Costs
steps.description: Collect task descriptions, hours per task, and calculate costs. Automatically calculate SOW_COST_AMOUNT = SOW_COST_HOURS × SOW_CONSULTANT_RATE. For task hours and estimated costs, insert newline-delimited values inside single cells.

steps.title: Step 3: Validation
steps.description: Validate all numeric fields (SOW_COST_HOURS, SOW_CONSULTANT_RATE, SOW_COST_AMOUNT). Validate email contains '@'. Validate SOW_BILLING_BASIS is 'Fixed Cost' or 'Time and Materials'. If any field is missing or invalid, prompt for correction.

steps.title: Step 4: Preview (Mandatory)
steps.description: Display a draft preview of the SOW. Show all populated fields. Ask the user to review and confirm or request specific changes. DO NOT generate the DOCX until user explicitly confirms.

steps.title: Step 5: Final Output
steps.description: Only after explicit user confirmation, populate the template SOW_Simple_Service_Template_Latest.docx with all placeholder values. Ensure all placeholders are replaced with confirmed data or marked as 'TBD'. Save the document with a sanitized filename (remove /, \, :, *, ?, ", <, >, |).

validation.message: Title must be in format: 'Company Name - SOW## - Work Name'
Hours must be a number (e.g., 40, not 'forty')
Rate must be a number in NZD (e.g., 150, not 'one hundred fifty')
Total cost must be a number
Must be 'Fixed Cost' or 'Time and Materials'

references.name: SOW09 - Partners Life - Shared APIM
references.description: Example SOW for API management project with Partners Life

references.name: SOW12 - Partners Life - Certificate Investigation and Remediation Plan
references.description: Example SOW for certificate investigation and remediation

references.name: SOW14 - CrowdStrike Logging Connector
references.description: Example SOW for CrowdStrike logging connector implementation

examples.title: Create SOW for Cloud Migration
examples.user_says: Create a SOW for Acme Corp cloud migration project
actions: Acknowledge: 'I see this is for ACME Corp. Would you like to complete the rest step-by-step, or autocomplete by pasting/uploading your rough notes?'
Collect SOW number/title (e.g., 'ACME Corp - SOW01 - Cloud Migration Assessment')
Confirm legal client name (check Companies Office)
Collect service description, approach, assumptions, exclusions, deliverables

examples.title: Autocomplete with Rough Notes
examples.user_says: Create a SOW - here's my rough notes: Acme Corp, Sarah as consultant, SharePoint setup, 40 hours at $150/hr, fixed price, deliverables include migration plan and training docs
actions: Parse rough notes and auto-fill: SOW_NUMBER_AND_TITLE, SOW_CONSULTANT, SOW_SERVICE_DESCRIPTION
Ask for clarification on missing fields (e.g., SOW number format, approach, assumptions)
Show preview for user to review
examples.result: SOW document with auto-filled fields from rough notes

common_errors.cause: Field was left empty or marked as TBD
common_errors.solution: Ensure all required fields are populated before generating DOCX
Remove special characters from filename. Use hyphens or underscores instead.
Ensure email contains @ and valid domain (e.g., name@company.com)

common_errors.cause: Hours or rate entered as text instead of numbers
common_errors.solution: Enter numeric values only (e.g., 80 hours, not 'eighty hours')

common_errors.cause: Same content in Service Description, Approach, Assumptions, or Exclusions
common_errors.solution: Keep Service Description high-level. Each section should have distinct content.
